name: Kartaški Front
description: Solo PvE deckbuilder — 4 borbe, permadeath, gradi špil po pobedi

modules.src/main.js: Entry point — wire-uje sve module, pokreće state machine event loop (bez rAF game loop — igra je turn-based, UI-driven)
modules.src/config.js: Sve konstante: PLAYER_MAX_HP, ENERGY_PER_TURN, starter deck definicije, reward pool po čvoru, neprijatelji sa intent patternima, efekti, boje
modules.src/state.js: createState(), saveState(), loadState(), resetState() — state shape sa phase enum, deck/hand/discard, player/enemy objekti, node tracking
modules.src/input.js: Mouse/touch event handleri za karte (click na .card), 'Kraj runde' dugme, reward izbor, map klik, game over / victory dugmad
modules.src/render.js: Canvas rendering: battlefield pozadina, neprijatelj silhueta (levo), igrač silhueta (desno), HP trake, intent ikona iznad neprijatelja, shield prikaz, efekt ikone
modules.src/ui.js: DOM menadžment: renderHand() kreira .card div-ove, showRewardScreen(), showGameOver(), showVictory(), showMapScreen(), updateToolbar(), highlightPlayedCard(), showDamageNumber()
modules.src/systems/combat.js: applyCard(state, cardId) — primeni kartu na state; endPlayerTurn(state) — trigguje RESOLVING→ENEMY_TURN tranziciju; applyEnemyIntent(state) — neprijatelj izvršava intent; checkCombatEnd(state) — vraća 'player_dead'|'enemy_dead'|null
modules.src/systems/effects.js: applyDoT(entity, effectType) — primeni tick efekta; applyEndOfTurnEffects(state, whose) — 'player'|'enemy'; addEffect(entity, effectName, value, duration); getEffectValue(entity, effectName) — vraća value ili 0
modules.src/systems/deck.js: drawHand(state) — vuče do 5 karata iz deck u hand (refill iz discard ako deck prazan); shuffleDeck(deck) — Fisher-Yates in-place; addCardToDeck(state, cardId) — dodaj u state.deck; discardHand(state) — hand→discard
modules.src/systems/progression.js: nextNode(state) — inkrement node, postavi novog neprijatelja; getRewardPool(nodeIndex) — vraća array card ID-eva za taj čvor; calculateScore(state) — formula: hp*10 + totalDamage/5 + node*50
modules.styles/base.css: Layout: toolbar (10vh), #battlefield canvas (50vh), #hand-zone DOM (40vh) — flexbox column, responsive, dark paleta #1a1a2e
modules.styles/ui.css: Karte: .card, .card-attack, .card-block, .card-effect stilovi; .card-disabled opacity; reward ekran; game over/victory overlay; toolbar HUD; HP trake izvan canvasa
modules.styles/game.css: Animacije: card hover lift, .card-played fadeOut, damage number pop-up, screen flash (.flash-red, .flash-green), intent ikona pulse
